summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Naqaab Filmmaking Club website. All major features working correctly including cinematic intro, authentication, modals, navigation, and responsive design.

ui_bugs.issue: Success message 'APPLICATION SUBMITTED' not visible after form submission
ui_bugs.note: Form still submits successfully and modal closes properly

passed_tests: Cinematic intro loads with skip button functionality
Navbar renders with logo, nav links (FILMS, EVENTS, TEAM, JOIN), and MEMBER LOGIN button
Hero section displays NAQAAB FILMMAKING title, tagline, two CTA buttons
Films Rail shows 6 film cards with titles, status, team count, synopsis, genre
About section shows stats (200+, 15+, 3+), description text, film strip
Events section tab toggle between PAST and UPCOMING tabs works
All 12 past events display with correct names, dates, categories
Naqaab Picks section shows film review cards
Team section shows all 4 board members, 3 creative members, 5 management members
Faculty Advisor card displays correctly
MEMBER LOGIN button opens login modal
Login with member/naqaab2025 works and shows member portal
Login with board/naqaab#board works and shows admin panel tab
Interest form modal opens from JOIN THE CLUB button
Interest form has all required fields and submits successfully
Member portal shows 3 tabs: UPCOMING EVENTS, WORKSHOPS, COMPETITIONS
Board user sees ADMIN PANEL tab with submissions and add event form
Logout functionality works
Social footer shows @naqaabfilms, @naqaabpicks, contact info
Nav links scroll to correct sections
Responsive layout at mobile viewport works properly
Mobile menu functionality works
All interactive elements are clickable and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Ensure success message 'APPLICATION SUBMITTED' is visible after interest form submission. Currently form submits successfully but success message visibility timing may need adjustment.
